MINI MINUTES: Line 3
Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mosser Companies is present. Represented by Antonio Cook.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Donald Proby is present.
Attorney Kyle Bassman appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of January 23, 2017 is vacated. (501)
